lastSuggestion.text: Proceed with Group A and B. Include the instructions for the CLAUDE.md setup to ensure they are always-on.

steeringHistory.suggestedPrompt: Proceed with #7, then tackle #1 and #6 together. Let's start with the ingest from conversation logic.
run the lint script to verify the structural integrity of the changes.
steeringHistory.actualUserPrompt: if I say "remember that ...", will the skill be triggered?

steeringHistory.suggestedPrompt: got it. ingest this: I've decided to move our primary documentation storage to a local-first approach using the llm-wiki-pm structure to ensure consistency across our project files.
steeringHistory.actualUserPrompt: Let's assume the environment where this is installed does not have any other memory system, tune for that.

steeringHistory.suggestedPrompt: Great. Now run the lint check to ensure those changes didn't break the existing schema integrity.
steeringHistory.actualUserPrompt: any other idea to make usability for this feel more and more like a natural second-brain/personal assistant?

steeringHistory.suggestedPrompt: I like the ambient fact capture (2), proactive recall (1), and session closing summary (5). Let's start with those—how do we bake the triggers for these into the SKILL.md instructions?
steeringHistory.actualUserPrompt: 1 2 3 4 6 7 8 9 10 11 sounds very nice, but do check if they are actually possible
